arts.ttl: 'There's no need' – Cristiano Ronaldo claim disputed by Lionel Messi's boss Javier Mascherano
arts.sum: Ex-Barcelona and Argentina star Javier Mascherano has challenged Cristiano Ronaldo's latest comments that he is the greatest player in the history of the game

arts.ttl: “If he thinks he is the best in history…” – Karim Benzema lifts lid on former Real Madrid teammate Cristiano Ronaldo
arts.sum: Al-Ittihad striker Karim Benzema (37) has responded to Cristiano Ronaldo’s (40) claims he is the greatest football of all time. The former France international followed in the Portuguese’s footsteps in…

arts.ttl: ‘Not Cristiano Ronaldo’: Karim Benzema makes shock GOAT pick
arts.sum: Real Madrid legend Karim Benzema has revealed that, for him, long-time teammate Cristiano Ronaldo is not the greatest player in history. Speaking recently Benzema said that he respects Ronaldo’s claim to be the greatest, but revealed that his own pick is another former Real Madrid star.

arts.ttl: The numbers behind Mohamed Salah’s ‘special’ season rivalling Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo peak
arts.sum: The Liverpool forward set even more records in the win at Manchester City and is closing in on one of the greatest individual seasons ever

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo celebration explained as Lionel Messi involved in two angry rows
arts.sum: Inter Miami and New York City played out an entertaining 2-2 draw in Sunday's MLS season opener - and one player couldn't resist rubbing salt in Lionel Messi's wounds

arts.ttl: Nico Williams pays Cristiano Ronaldo tribute after brace in Athletic Club’s rout of Real Valladolid
arts.sum: Athletic Club star Nico Williams on Sunday paid something of a tribute to Real Madrid icon Cristiano Ronaldo. This came en route to Athletic’s La Liga rout of Real Valladolid.…
